keywords.job: Well, I'm the boss of this tavern.
keywords.name: I'm Snake Eye.
keywords.eye: Well, I had a dispute with a snake once. And the snake won. Bit my left eye out. Therefore, Snake Eye.
keywords.snake: Well, I had a dispute with a snake once. And the snake won. Bit my left eye out. Therefore, Snake Eye.
keywords.boss: Yeah. I'm the boss. So don't bother me.
keywords.tavern: It's a great tavern. No closing time. No problems with kings or other rulers. Best place in Tibia.
keywords.tibia: There's already too much order in Tibia. We don't need kings or whatever.
keywords.god: The Gods of Tibia! What a crap! It's all superstition!
keywords.crap: Crap. Crap! CRAP! It's all CRAP!
keywords.superstition: Believe me! There are no gods.
keywords.durin: He's the worst. The so called god of the dwarfs. I don't believe it. It's all crap.
keywords.thais: In the beginning, it was a nice encampment. Now it's an overcrowded, polluted city. I hate it!
keywords.carlin: I've never been there. Don't know anything about it.
keywords.kazordoon: Kazordoon is alright. Except the dwarfs. I don't like them. But the mountains are a good place. Been there once.
keywords.ab'dendriel: I've never been there. I don't like the elves anyway.
keywords.edron: That's a place for wealthy toffs!
keywords.wild: There are a lot of wild warriors around. They built this camp.
keywords.warrior: There are a lot of wild warriors around. They built this camp.
keywords.camp: Well, the real wild warriors don't live here. They hide in the woods.
keywords.hide: Well. I know of a small camp to the south.
keywords.south: It's abandoned. But I bet that something is hidden there!
keywords.hidden: Go and find out yourself. You can tell me if you find something.
keywords.copper: Hmmm. A copper key. You should ask H.L. about it.
keywords.key: Hmmm. A copper key. You should ask H.L. about it.
He is a wild warrior. Nobody knows his real name. We just call im H.L. You can find him in the small armory shop.
keywords.hl: He is a wild warrior. Nobody knows his real name. We just call im H.L. You can find him in the small armory shop.
keywords.wood: It's the best place to live. By the way, there's an old wild warrior building to the southwest. It might be interesting for you.
keywords.building: Go and ask H.L. about it.
keywords.buy: Do you want to eat or drink?
keywords.eat: Ok, I have fish, meat, and bread. What do you want?
keywords.drink: I can offer you beer, wine, and water. Water is for free.

texts: Hi . Come in and have a drink.
Well, I'm the boss of this tavern.

greetingPatterns.response: Hi %N. Come in and have a drink.

entries.response: What? You don't have the money. You crook. Get lost.
